description: Skul The Hero Slayer is a 2D action platformer where you play as Skul, a skeleton who can swap out his head to gain different abilities.

0.1.0.description:
First release!

Setup instructions can be found in the skul world folder in worlds.
0.1.0.title: Skul: The Hero Slayer v0.1.0

1.0.0.description:
- [APWorld/Client] Removed area based shrine checks, changing them to generic shrine checks that work on any shrines across any runs.
- [APWorld] Fixed logic bug where Fatal Mind and Spirit Acceleration had swapped requirements
- [Client] Fixed bug where the Castle Repair costs weren't reduced properly

This is the final major release planned for now, barring any bug fixes that need fixing, as I've been quite busy. May do more in the future!
1.0.0.title: Skul: The Hero Slayer Archipelago v1.0.0
